example: Today, we shall learn the basics of letter writing.
Now, open your notebook and write a letter to your grandmother.
Write a letter to your grandmother about what you did in the holidays.
Then write to your aunt, telling her about your new bicycle.
Everybody, write the letter as homework and bring it tomorrow.
I thought I would write a letter and clarify.

ja: ナンセンス、無意味なこと

example: Please get a note from your mother tomorrow.
I am writing you this letter to ask if I can write a letter to my cousin in Tinkletown.
